name: Proline Cat Food Pouch Lamb Chunks In Jelly 85g
description: Proline Cat Food Pouch Lamb Chunks in Jelly is a fully balanced wet meal specially formulated to meet the daily nutritional needs of adult cats of all breeds. Made with high-quality lamb as the primary protein source, it supports strong muscles, sustained energy, and overall feline well-being. Tender lamb chunks are served in a rich, savory jelly that enhances flavor and texture, making it highly palatable even for fussy eaters. The moisture-rich jelly helps support daily hydration and promotes healthy kidney and urinary tract function. Enriched with essential vitamins, minerals, and taurine, this complete recipe supports heart health, sharp vision, strong immunity, healthy skin and coat condition. Packed in a convenient single-serve pouch, it ensures freshness at every meal while allowing easy, mess-free feeding. Key Benefits . High-quality lamb protein supports strong muscles and vitality . Complete and balanced nutrition for adult cats . Tender chunks in jelly for enhanced taste and texture . Taurine enriched to support heart and eye health . High moisture content supports hydration and urinary health . Supports healthy skin, coat, and immune function . Gentle digestion with quality ingredients . Convenient pouch for freshness and easy serving Nutritional Information (Typical Analysis) Crude Protein: 8.5% Crude Fat: 4.5% Crude Ash: 2.5% Crude Fiber: 0.3% Moisture: 83% Added Nutrients: Vitamin D3, Vitamin E, Biotin, Taurine, Zinc, Copper, Manganese Feeding Guidelines Feed 1 pouch per meal Provide 2.5–3 pouches daily for an average 4 kg adult cat Adjust portions based on age, weight, and activity level Serve at room temperature Always provide fresh, clean drinking water Suitable For . Adult cats of all breeds . Cats that prefer moist, tender food textures . Daily maintenance feeding
